segments.text: May dekh rahi hoon ki yeh saari pyaar ki mahima kaise phayal gaye, kahan se kahan pauch
Kitne logon tak iski khabar hi nahin. Kintu uska pura shaastra samaj mein aap hai
Pyaar ka bhi koi shaastra ho sakta hain
Pyaar ka koi shaastri thi, pyaar jo hai ek maha mandal ki tarahe sab door chaya ho.
Uska aisaas hme nahi usse hum jaante nahin lekin parmatma ka pyaar hain.
Yeh to sare door saari srishthi mein,
saare sansaar mein har ek desh mein phailaa hua.
Aapke atma sakshatkar hone ke baad hi aap isko mahusoos kar sakte, isko jaan sakte.
Ki ye pyar hai, ye parmatama ka pyar hai.
Parmatama ki shakti sirf pyar hain
aur pyaran hi ki shakti karyanviit hoti hain
Hum log isse samaj nahi paate
Kisi se nafrat karna, kisi ke prati dhushth bhaav rakhna
kisi se jagda karna
ye toh bahut hi giri hui baat hain.
Aap sah jughi hai, aapke manne mein
sirf pyaar ke aur kuch bhi nahina jeen
Apne deshe main aaj kal jo afat mirchi
usko dekhte hua samjh me ne yaata hain
ki dharma ke naam par itna prakaand
rauro
insaan mein kyo khada karthe hain
iski kya darbat hain?

basically

not out of pressure
but from inside if your

you have got your Realization

Eka Dant Vakra Tundana Dayakya Sutra Ganga
Rakt Gatra Thumranetra Shukla Vasthramandita
Kalpavruksha Bhagta Raksh Namostu Dekajanam
Aadri Pani Moosh Kaadi Rohina
Agni Koki Soorya Jyoti Vajrakoni Nirpanam
Vashupani, Chakrapaani, Moosh Kaadi Hohi Naam
Agni Koti Suryaj Jyoti Bhajra Koti Nirman
Chitramal Bhati Jaan Baal Chandr Shobhi
Kalpavreksh Bhaktraksh Namosto Tegjaana
Jasutambaje Ganeshamish Nandna
Shukna vasra mandita kalpavriksha bhaktarach namo sthote gajanam
Karm nirmanam visvaharta, vishvakarta yatra tatra pujitamm
Visva veerya, visvasuurya, visva karm nirmana
Vishwa harta, vishva karta yatra taitra pujitam chatur mukham chaturbhujam sevutam chaturyugam
kalpavritsha bhagdharashtyamosthute gajanaram tasu tamba jay gañesami shilantram
Eka Tantra Bhakra Tundra Naga Yajya Suddhaka
Radha Katra Tumhru Neta Shukla Vastravandita
Kalpavrish Bhakta Raksha
Namostu Te Gajarana
Namostu Te Gajarana
